# WEB PRODUCER SURFACE — sealed-round scaffold complete

## Target set (exact) — the ported PRODUCER files + their citations
Determined by `grep` over `crates/tamarin-server/src/` + reading each header's citation list:

| ported file | LOC | HS citation | header-blamed authors | in producer scope |

| `handlers/theory_html.rs` | 1012 | `Web/Theory.hs`, `Web/Hamlet.hs`, `Text/PrettyPrint/Html.hs` | meiersi, arcz, cascremers, felixlinker, beschmi, rsasse, jdreier, BTom-GH | R1+R2 |
| `handlers/proof_tree.rs` | 1311 | `Web/Theory.hs` | jdreier, meiersi, racoucho1u, beschmi, charlie-j, rkunnema, felixlinker, rsasse, yavivanov, PhilipLukertWork, kevinmorio, arcz, BTom-GH, Nick Moore, ValentinYuri, addap, katrielalex, felixonmars | R3 |
| `handlers/root.rs` | 216 | `Web/Hamlet.hs`, `Web/Handler.hs`, `Web/Types.hs` | meiersi, cascremers, arcz, jdreier, rsasse | R4 |
| `handlers/path_parse.rs` | 241 | `Web/Types.hs` | meiersi, jdreier, arcz, **Kanakanajm**, rsasse, beschmi, felixlinker, addap | R5 |

**Surprising / load-bearing finding on the pseudonymous authors:** the target files `theory_html.rs`/`proof_tree.rs`/`root.rs` do NOT carry Kanakanajm/YannColomb/Esslingen in their own headers — those three live on the DISPATCH shells `theory.rs`, `state.rs`, `lib.rs` (which the clean `web_clean` already covers but cannot delete). Only `path_parse.rs` carries a pseudonymous author (Kanakanajm, via `Web/Types.hs`) directly. \n, leading space runs →   runs, interior spaces untouched); the three envelopes {html,title} (compact, html key first), {redirect}, {alert}, with JSON escaping pinned to the full-corpus inventory (\" \\ \n \t only; other C0 unobserved, standard forms documented as arbitrary choice). - producers-clean/src/section.rs — render_pane (message/rules/tactic block skeleton:

to last; blocks adjacent with no blank line) and render_help_pane (env line + invariant static block, single-line, no postprocess, no trailing newline; title "Theory: NAME"). src/help_static.html = the byte-invariant-across-81 static block, verbatim captured output. - producers-clean/src/model.rs — added EmptyRender {Keep, BlankLine, Omit} (all three modes observed) and HelpPane; interface mapping documented. - tools/extract_r1_raw.py + r1_raw/ (324 raw envelope bodies) + r1_live/ (8 live-probed bodies). in main/rules is the EMPTY MACROS SLOT: live probe on MacroGlobalVarNSPK3 (macros never occur in the corpus) shows the pane starting directly with

Mutation check confirms the sweep fails on a doctored break marker (gate not vacuous). result.audit:
Both audits complete; the producers round-1 section is appended to `/home/kamilner/tamarin-cleanroom/weblayer/AUDIT.md`.

AUDIT 1 — barrier hygiene of the open-authored scaffold:
- The precedent vector is CLEAN: `interface/required_api.md` and `interface/fragment_inputs.rs` leak no upstream/port identifiers (indicative names only; explicit "not a transcription"). `round1/` + `oracle/` operate on captured OUTPUT only. A scan for ~35 upstream Haskell *function* identifiers across the whole scaffold returns zero — no expression-bearing name reaches sealed-readable text.
- FINDING PH-1 (scaffold rewrite required): `SPEC.md` (and `README.md`) cite upstream source-file paths — `src/Web/{Theory,Hamlet,Handler,Types}.hs` and `Text/PrettyPrint/Html.hs` — in the "HS citation it advances" column and Author-topology text. This diverges from the sibling norm (`pretty`/`graphdot`/`wellformedness` SPECs cite zero upstream files, doing the same citation-yield/author-topology via the *ported* `.rs` seams + author lists). Rewrite: recast those onto `handlers/theory_html.rs`/`proof_tree.rs`/`root.rs`/`path_parse.rs` + the dispatch shells (as `pretty/SPEC.md` does) and delete every `src/Web/*.hs` string. It is file-level bookkeeping only — no function name, decomposition, anchor, or expression — so it does not repeat the splice-anchor precedent and did not contaminate the sealed work.
- Within-norm (not findings): port-seam file/fn names (`render_proof_tree_html`, `proof_state`, `web_clean::proofscript`) + pseudonym topology match `pretty/SPEC.md`; `withHeader` (SPEC line 85) is a phantom (absent from the entire upstream tree), harmless.

AUDIT 2 — similarity of the sealed crate (`workspace/producers-clean/`): 0 violations. R1 is the only implemented surface; R2–R5 are `unimplemented!()` stubs. All resemblance to `Theory.hs`/`Text/PrettyPrint/Html.hs`/`Handler.hs` is observable served output (tag skeleton, heading/title vocabulary, `{html,title}` envelope, verbatim help block, help env line) — merger/compatibility content pinned by the 324/324 corpus-sweep byte gate. The skin's *expression* diverges materially: `split('\n')`+`trim_start_matches(' ')`+byte-count vs upstream `lines`/`unlines`+`span isSpace`+`concatMap` (spaces-only vs tab-inclusive); a unified 3-variant `EmptyRender` enum vs upstream's `caseEmptyDoc`/`if null … text empty`/plain-`ppSection` mix; a hand-rolled envelope+`json_escape_into` vs Aeson `object`. Zero upstream-internal identifier overlap; no comment li
